overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing third-person combat in gothic industrial ruins. The player character in blue power armor engages Tyranid aliens in melee and ranged combat, with dynamic shifts between normal industrial lighting and red emergency alert states.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic industrial container yard with metal walkways

events.description: engages large Tyranid warrior in melee combat with chainsword
transitions from combat to tactical movement through container area

agents.ego_description: fighting Tyranid enemies with melee attacks while navigating through industrial containers and metal walkways

notable_agents.action: large Tyranid warrior attacking with scythe-like claws

entered.detail: massive gothic stone and metal structures with intricate detailing typical of 40k architecture
industrial shipping containers with yellow and black hazard stripes
metal grid flooring with blood stains and debris scattered across surface
large support columns with gothic architectural details and chains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a gothic industrial interior with the player character in blue power armor engaging a large Tyranid warrior in close combat. The environment features yellow-striped industrial containers, metal grate flooring, and massive gothic architecture. The character moves tactically through the container yard, transitioning from combat to movement while navigating the debris-strewn concrete walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: combat arena under red emergency alert lighting

events.description: environment shifts to red emergency alert lighting indicating combat alarm state
overwhelmed by swarm of smaller Tyranid creatures in close quarters melee

agents.ego_description: fighting off swarm of Tyranid creatures in intense close quarters melee combat while surrounded

notable_agents.action: Tyranid swarm creatures attacking from all sides with claws and teeth

entered.detail: pervasive red alert lighting that bathes the entire scene in crimson emergency glow
scattered rubble and destroyed machinery from ongoing battle

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to intense close-quarters combat under red emergency lighting. The player is surrounded by a dense swarm of Tyranid creatures attacking from all directions. The environment is bathed in crimson alert lights, with industrial rubble and debris scattered across the metal flooring as the character fights off the overwhelming assault.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform with sight lines to distant targets

events.description: switches to ranged combat stance, aiming down weapon sights at distant targets
red emergency lighting fades back to normal industrial lighting

agents.ego_description: taking cover and aiming bolter rifle at distant Tyranid targets, firing laser-sighted shots

notable_agents.action: Tyranid creature moving in the distance, targeted by the player

entered.detail: bright industrial spotlight cutting through the darkness and smoke
large industrial equipment and structures visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to an over-shoulder aiming view as the character engages in ranged combat. The red alert lighting gradually fades back to normal industrial tones. The player targets distant Tyranid creatures using a laser-sighted weapon, with industrial spotlights and distant machinery visible in the gothic architecture background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic industrial complex that shifts from tactical melee combat into a chaotic red-alert ambush before returning to a focused ranged engagement. It begins with the character in blue power armor fighting a large Tyranid warrior amidst yellow-striped containers and metal grate flooring, moving tactically across debris-strewn concrete walkways. As the character pushes deeper into the facility, the environment is suddenly bathed in crimson emergency lighting while a dense swarm of creatures closes in for an overwhelming close-quarters assault. The scene then shifts to an over-the-shoulder perspective as the red alert fades back into normal industrial tones, allowing the character to target distant enemies with a laser-sighted weapon. Finally, the view expands to reveal industrial spotlights and massive gothic machinery in the background as the combat transitions to a ranged standoff.
